context.task: Break down a long research paper into sections, analyze each section for key findings, then synthesize a coherent summary
context.input: A 40-page research paper on climate change impacts

steps.description: Split the document by headings and topic boundaries
Extract key claims, evidence, and conclusions from each part
Find themes, contradictions, and supporting evidence across sections
Combine individual analyses into a coherent structured summary

context.task: Validate incoming support ticket format, classify the issue type, then route to the appropriate specialist team
context.input: Incoming customer support ticket with subject and body

steps.description: Check that required fields are present and well-formed
Determine the type/category of the request
Score the request's priority based on content signals

steps.action: route to appropriate handler based on classification
steps.description: Direct to the right processing path

context.task: Generate a draft, evaluate it against criteria, refine weak areas, and repeat until quality threshold is met
context.input: Write a compelling product description for a new tech gadget

steps.action: generate initial draft from input requirements
steps.description: Produce a first attempt based on the brief
Score the draft on clarity, persuasiveness, and accuracy
Pinpoint which parts fall below threshold

steps.action: refine weak sections while preserving strengths
steps.description: Targeted improvement of identified weak areas
Check if quality threshold is met, loop if not

context.task: Break down a large pull request into individual file changes, analyze each file for issues and improvements, then synthesize an overall review
context.input: A PR with 25 changed files across 4 modules

context.input: User-generated post with text, images, and links

title: Transfer: Code Optimization (should recall Iterative Refinement)

context.task: Generate an initial optimization, benchmark it against performance criteria, identify bottlenecks, refine the hot paths, and repeat until performance target is met

context.input: A 1500-word student essay on the causes of World War I
